target.title: fix(agents): guard side-effect confirmations with tool evidence
target.body:
## summary

OpenClaw's vision says the assistant should actually do things on a user's devices and channels. That makes confirmations part of the runtime contract. If the assistant says it sent a message, created a ticket, booked something, or called a provider API, the runtime should have current-run evidence from the tool result.

This PR adds a generic evidence path for tool-backed side effects. The first detector handles SMS-style send confirmations because that is the failure case I could reproduce. The API shape is broader than SMS.

## problem

Today the assistant can report that an external action completed even when the current run has no matching tool evidence.

The failure mode is:

1. A tool call fails, is skipped, runs as dry run, or returns data that never gets tied to the final assistant text.
2. The assistant still says the action completed, sometimes with provider-looking status or ID fields.
3. The user treats that as a receipt and stops checking the external system.

The invariant this PR enforces is:

> User-visible confirmations of side effects should be backed by current-run evidence from the tool that performed the action.

That fits the project priorities in `VISION.md`: safer defaults, stability, messaging channel reliability, and better agent harness behavior.

## what changed

- Plugin tools can declare how to extract side-effect evidence from successful tool results.
- The runtime records evidence only for the plugin-owned tool that actually ran.
- Built-in `message` tool SMS send receipts are normalized into the same evidence model.
- Built-in message receipt normalization reads the actual `AgentToolResult.details` wrapper produced by `jsonResult(result.payload)`.
- Evidence is preserved across retry and failover attempts in the same run.
- Receipt-like assistant output is checked before user-visible delivery.
- The guard runs on terminal payloads, partial streaming replies, streamed block replies, and chunked block replies.
- SMS-style send confirmations are the first supported claim detector, including accepted/queued wording.
- First-person receipt wording such as `I sent the SMS. Status: accepted/queued. Message ID: ...` is detected.
- Composite receipt status text such as `accepted/queued` matches concrete provider evidence such as `accepted` or `queued`.
- Documented generic success statuses now include `created`, so non-SMS action evidence such as ticket creation can use the same contract.
- Guarded chunked block replacements are recorded as delivered so `message_end` does not emit the same replacement again.
- The plugin SDK docs document `externalActionEvidence` as a narrow receipt-evidence contract for externally visible side effects.
- The plugin SDK surface budget is raised by one public export for the new documented metadata field.

## scope

This is not a Dialpad feature and it is not intended to make SMS special. SMS is only the first concrete side-effect class covered by the detector because it exposed the bug.

The core issue belongs in the agent runtime because core owns retries, streaming delivery, terminal payload construction, and final user-visible text. Plugins can provide evidence, but core has to decide whether an unsupported completion claim is safe to deliver.

## linked context

- No exact existing issue or PR found for side-effect confirmation evidence before opening this PR.
- Related but not duplicate: #90998 covers SMS text command auth, not side-effect receipt evidence.

## real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: an agent could make a user-visible side-effect confirmation with provider-like fields even when the current run had no matching successful tool-result evidence.
- Concrete reproducible case used for this PR: SMS-style send receipt text with `Status: accepted/queued` and `Message ID`.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout rebased onto upstream `origin/main` at `d1ab308f5c770f13eefe2e6769c41729438e2a92`, commit `9582d9a2d075633f388bd86bc4fbd990a842e8ab`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `timeout -k5s 120s node --import tsx --input-type=module` with an inline proof script that imported `subscribeEmbeddedAgentSession`, emitted a redacted built-in `message` tool `tool_execution_start` and `tool_execution_end`, passed the send payload under `AgentToolResult.details` like `jsonResult(result.payload)`, then emitted the exact assistant `text_end` delivery payload through the subscription's `onBlockReply` path.
- Evidence after fix:

```json
{
  "head": "9582d9a2d075633f388bd86bc4fbd990a842e8ab",
  "base": "d1ab308f5c770f13eefe2e6769c41729438e2a92",
  "deliveryPath": "subscribeEmbeddedAgentSession -> actual message AgentToolResult.details -> text_end onBlockReply",
  "withEvidence": {
    "messageToolResultShape": "AgentToolResult.details from jsonResult(result.payload)",
    "assistantDeliveryText": "I sent the SMS. Status: accepted/queued. Message ID: SM_proof_redacted_1234",
    "externalActionEvidence": [
      {
        "actionFamily": "sms",
        "toolName": "message",
        "providerId": "SM_proof_redacted_1234",
        "status": "queued",
        "sender": "+15557654321",
        "recipient": "+15551234567"
      }
    ],
    "deliveredBlockReplies": [
      "I sent the SMS. Status: accepted/queued. Message ID: SM_proof_redacted_1234"
    ],
    "guardReplacementUsed": false
  },
  "withoutEvidence": {
    "assistantDeliveryText": "I sent the SMS. Status: accepted/queued. Message ID: SM_proof_redacted_1234",
    "externalActionEvidence": [],
    "deliveredBlockReplies": [
      "I cannot verify that this SMS was sent. I do not have matching current-turn delivery evidence, so please check the messaging provider history or use the verified send flow before reporting it as sent."
    ],
    "guardReplacementUsed": true
  }
}
```

- Observed result after fix: through the embedded-agent subscription delivery path, a matching current-run tool receipt from the actual `AgentToolResult.details` wrapper lets the side-effect confirmation reach `onBlockReply`, while the same confirmation without evidence is replaced before user-visible delivery.
- What was not tested: a live provider send against production credentials was not performed.
- Proof limitation: the provider receipt is redacted and injected as a built-in `message` tool result. This avoids sending a real SMS while still exercising the actual message-tool result wrapper, embedded subscription event path, evidence accumulator, receipt guard, and final block delivery together.
- Before evidence: the motivating regression was observed in a live operator workflow where the external provider UI/history did not show the claimed sent message even though the agent reported a sent/queued receipt.

## tests and validation

- `timeout -k5s 240s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.test.ts`
  - Result at `9582d9a2d075633f388bd86bc4fbd990a842e8ab`: 2 Vitest shards passed; 4 unit-fast files / 35 tests and 2 agents files / 84 tests.
- `timeout -k5s 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/plugin-prerelease-test-plan.test.ts`
  - Result at `9582d9a2d075633f388bd86bc4fbd990a842e8ab`: passed; 1 tooling file / 11 tests.
- `timeout -k5s 120s node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
  - Result: passed; public package SDK entrypoints `320`, exports `10302`, callable exports `5169`, deprecated exports `3244`, wildcard reexports `215`.
- `timeout -k5s 120s ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/external-action-receipts.ts src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs`
  - Result: passed.
- `timeout -k5s 120s ./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/external-action-receipts.ts src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs`
  - Result: passed.
- `git diff --check`
  - Result: passed.
- Earlier broader focused validation on this PR branch also passed:
  - `timeout -k5s 240s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.media.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/host-hooks.contract.test.ts`
    - Result: 3 Vitest shards passed; 4 unit-fast files / 85 tests, 1 contracts-plugin file / 64 tests, 3 agents files / 110 tests.
- Attempted broader local wrappers:
  - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ...` aborted locally because pnpm wanted to purge `node_modules` without a TTY, so the direct checked-in binary was used instead.
  - `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ...` failed before file-level linting during global plugin SDK DTS preparation on local dependency/type state unrelated to this PR (`proper-lockfile`, `hosted-git-info`, and `rastermill` declaration mismatches under the local `node_modules` path). Direct file-level `oxlint` passed for the touched files. CI is the authoritative check for the broad wrapper.

## current review state

This revision addresses the concrete ClawSweeper findings from the previous review:

- branch is rebased onto current `origin/main` at `d1ab308f5c770f13eefe2e6769c41729438e2a92`
- built-in `message` tool SMS receipts feed the same evidence accumulator
- built-in `message` tool receipt evidence is read from the actual `AgentToolResult.details` wrapper
- guarded chunked block replacements are marked as delivered before suppressing chunks
- accepted/queued receipt starts and first-person SMS receipt wording are detected and guarded
- composite accepted/queued receipt claims match concrete accepted or queued provider evidence
- documented generic status `created` is accepted and covered by a non-SMS receipt test
- proof now exercises `subscribeEmbeddedAgentSession` through tool start, actual wrapped tool result, assistant `text_end`, and `onBlockReply` delivery
- `externalActionEvidence` is documented as a generic side-effect receipt-evidence contract, not an SMS-only API
- the SDK surface budget is updated for the intentional public metadata field

The new plugin `externalActionEvidence` metadata contract is documented in `docs/plugins/sdk-overview.md`. Remaining maintainer decision: whether this documented core/plugin API shape is acceptable for future side-effect evidence.

## risk checklist

- [x] Plugin metadata is owner-scoped by plugin ID plus tool name, so another plugin cannot spoof evidence metadata for a same-named tool.
- [x] Dry-run and failed results are not recorded as successful evidence.
- [x] Current-run evidence is accumulated across retry attempts.
- [x] Built-in message-tool SMS receipts feed the evidence accumulator.
- [x] Built-in message-tool SMS receipts are read from `AgentToolResult.details`.
- [x] Streamed partial replies, block replies, chunked block replies, and terminal payloads enforce the same receipt invariant.
- [x] Guarded chunked replacements are marked as delivered so `message_end` does not duplicate them.
- [x] Reply routing metadata is preserved when replacing unsupported receipt text.
- [x] Accepted/queued SMS receipt starts are detected.
- [x] First-person SMS receipt claims with provider status and message id are detected.
- [x] Composite accepted/queued receipt claims match concrete accepted or queued provider evidence.
- [x] Generic documented status `created` is accepted for non-SMS external actions.
- [x] Non-SMS receipts and explanatory SMS documentation are not treated as sent SMS receipts.
- [x] Redacted embedded-subscription delivery proof is supplied.
- [x] Plugin SDK docs explain the `externalActionEvidence` contract and dry-run/current-run evidence boundary.

## size note

[size/exempt: safety invariant spans plugin metadata contract, built-in message receipt normalization, evidence collection, retry accumulation, streamed replies, chunked block replies, terminal payloads, and regression tests; splitting would leave a non-enforcing partial change.]

## AI assistance

This PR was authored with Codex. Local Codex review was run before the final rebase, and ClawSweeper feedback was addressed in this revision. Testing depth is listed above.
target.author: kesslerio
